task_updates.executor_notes: Moved track sorting and label rendering into TimelineCanvas with a sortable row wrapper that owns both the sticky label and the row clip content, removed the sidebar-based track DnD tree and scroll-sync path from TimelineEditor, and trimmed the obsolete canvas scroll-top handle from the shared type. TypeScript check passed after the atomic cutover. Static reference checks confirm the TimelineEditor path no longer renders TrackLabel or uses trackLabelRef/setScrollTop; browser-level validation for sticky behavior and dnd-kit console warnings remains pending.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Static verification passed: the TimelineEditor path no longer mounts the sidebar TrackLabel sortable tree, TimelineCanvas now owns the single row-level DndContext/SortableContext registration path, and the in-row label container is configured with sticky left positioning inside the scroll container. Browser validation for duplicate-ID console warnings and runtime sticky behavior remains pending.
